metadata.name: Cloudfin Raptor evolve trigger adds +1/+1 counter
metadata.description: P1 controls a Cloudfin Raptor (0/1, Flying, Evolve). P1 casts Monastery Swiftspear (1/2), which has greater power and toughness than Cloudfin Raptor. The Evolve triggered ability goes onto the stack (CR 702.100a). Both players pass priority. The evolve trigger resolves and a +1/+1 counter is placed on Cloudfin Raptor. Final assertion: Cloudfin Raptor has 1 +1/+1 counter.
metadata.generation_notes: CR 702.100a: Evolve is 'Whenever a creature you control enters, if that creature's power is greater than this creature's power and/or that creature's toughness is greater than this creature's toughness, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.' Cloudfin Raptor is 0/1. Monastery Swiftspear is 1/2. Power 1 > 0 AND toughness 2 > 1, so evolve triggers. After trigger resolves, Cloudfin Raptor should have 1 +1/+1 counter (becomes 1/2). Counter assertion uses the harness path 'permanent.Cloudfin Raptor.counters.plus_one_plus_one' (parse_counter_type maps 'plus_one_plus_one' to CounterType::PlusOnePlusOne). HARNESS FAILURE (engine gap, not script error): The harness placed Cloudfin Raptor on the battlefield but as a minimal creature object with no keyword abilities, because Cloudfin Raptor has no CardDefinition in crates/engine/src/cards/definitions.rs. The evolve trigger never fired (zones.stack.count was 0 after Swiftspear resolved; counter remained 0). The script is the correct CR ground truth. To make this script pass, add a CardDefinition for Cloudfin Raptor: Creature — Bird Mutant, mana cost {U}, P/T 0/1, abilities [KeywordAbility::Flying, KeywordAbility::Evolve].

disputes.description: Engine gap: Cloudfin Raptor is not defined in the engine's CardDefinition registry (crates/engine/src/cards/definitions.rs). The harness places the card as a minimal creature without keyword abilities, so the Evolve keyword never fires. Harness output: 'zones.stack.count expected=1 actual=0' and 'permanent.Cloudfin Raptor.counters.plus_one_plus_one expected=1 actual=0'. Fix: add CardDefinition for Cloudfin Raptor with KeywordAbility::Flying and KeywordAbility::Evolve, mana cost {U}, P/T 0/1, Creature — Bird Mutant. The script CR logic (702.100a) is correct and should not be changed.

script.step_note: P1 casts Monastery Swiftspear; Evolve triggers on Cloudfin Raptor

actions.description: Initial: Cloudfin Raptor (0/1) and Mountain on battlefield, Monastery Swiftspear in hand
actions.note: Cloudfin Raptor is on battlefield with no counters. Monastery Swiftspear is in p1 hand ready to cast.
CR 601.2: p1 casts Monastery Swiftspear for {R}. No targets needed.

actions.description: After casting: Monastery Swiftspear on stack, hand empty
actions.note: Monastery Swiftspear is now on the stack awaiting resolution.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Monastery Swiftspear resolves.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Monastery Swiftspear (1/2) enters the battlefield under p1's control.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Monastery Swiftspear (1/2) enters battlefield. CR 702.100a: Evolve on Cloudfin Raptor (0/1) sees greater power (1 > 0) and toughness (2 > 1) — evolve triggers and goes on the stack.

actions.description: After Swiftspear resolves: Swiftspear on battlefield, evolve trigger on stack, no counter yet
actions.note: Monastery Swiftspear is now on battlefield. Evolve trigger is on the stack. Counter has not been placed yet.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — evolve trigger resolves.

resolution.note: CR 702.100a: Evolve trigger resolves — Monastery Swiftspear (1/2) has greater power (1 > 0) and toughness (2 > 1) than Cloudfin Raptor (0/1). Put a +1/+1 counter on Cloudfin Raptor.

actions.note: CR 702.100b: Cloudfin Raptor evolves — one +1/+1 counter is placed on it, making it 1/2.

actions.description: Final: Cloudfin Raptor has 1 +1/+1 counter, stack empty
actions.note: CR 702.100b: Cloudfin Raptor has evolved — it now has 1 +1/+1 counter (base 0/1 + counter = 1/2). Stack is empty.
